name: S-13 freshness gate exits one when the source is stale and no upstream-stub is available to refresh
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-20T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/src.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id src --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'stale' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
